name: Zanka Nijiku
description:
he's new here | gachiakuta

as usual, enjin brought in another stray. this time it was the prestigious zanka from the nijiku family. the same one who was supposed to follow in the footsteps of his brother and sister in the hell guard and now he's here in the cleaners?

Gachiakuta | AnyPOV
